title: Action verbs sprint
description: Quick verbs — train action-words for daily writing speed
text: run jump write read type code learn teach build make plan ship test fix find search send share open close start stop help play work move keep show

tips.text: Verbs do the heavy lifting in any sentence. Type them fast and your writing moves.
Mind the endings: -ck, -mp, -nd. Those little clusters trip people up, so give them a few honest reps.

tips.target: run jump write read type code learn teach build make plan ship test fix

tips.text: Let each verb land on its own even beat. Steady and unhurried beats fast and ragged every time.

tips.target: find search send share open close start stop help play work move keep show

character_tips.anna: Verbs drive the sentence. Practice them and you practice a good slice of all your writing. - Eleanor Hayes, editor
character_tips.maxim: These are the engine words. Drill them and the speed follows you into any text. - Eleanor Hayes, editor
character_tips.knopych: Verbs do the work. Type them clean, one firm beat each. - Eleanor Hayes, editor
character_tips.klavochka: Each word its own steady beat, like a clock that keeps good time. - Eleanor Hayes, editor
